title: Enums and Extensions
description: Defining enums and adding functionality with extensions.

slides.title: Enums 🔢
slides.content:
# Enumerations (Enums)

Enums are a special type used to represent a fixed number of constant values.

* Declare with `enum` keyword.
* Each value is an instance of the enum.
* You can get all values with `EnumName.values`.

quizData.question: How do you access all values of an enum `Color`?
quizData.explanation: `.values` returns a list of all enum values.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Extensions can add functionality to any type

You can add methods to existing classes, even from external libraries, without modifying them.
